mapper.select: SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.CONT_NUM ' / ' ECCT.CONT_CNT AS CONT_NUM_AND_CNT ,(ECCT.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE ,(ECCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE ,(ECCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , ECCT.CONT_DESC , ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD , ECCT.CUR , ECCT.CONT_AMT , TO_CHAR(ECCT.CONT_AMT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS CONT_AMT_COMMA , ECCT.VAT_TYPE ,(SELECT CODE_DESC FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND CODE = ECCT.VAT_TYPE AND CODE_TYPE = 'M100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1') AS VAT_TYPE_NM , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , ECCT.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , ECCT.CERT_TYPE , ECCT.AMT_TYPE ,ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,ECCT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM , ECCT.DELAY_RMK , ECCT.DELAY_NUME_RATE , ECCT.DELAY_DENO_RATE , ECCT.STAMP_DUTY_FLAG , ECCT.STAMP_DUTY_AMT , TO_CHAR(ECCT.STAMP_DUTY_AMT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS STAMP_DUTY_AMT_COMMA , ECCT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , ECCT.CONT_RMK , ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM , ECCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM , ECCT.PROGRESS_CD , ECCT.APP_DOC_NUM , ECCT.SIGN_STATUS , ECCT.APP_DOC_CNT ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SYS_DATE ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.PROGRESS_CD < 4210 OR ECCT.PROGRESS_CD = '4220' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END) AS ATT_FILE_EDITABLE ,(SELECT MIN(ECRJ.REJECT_RMK) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY ECRJ.REJECT_SQ DESC) FROM STOCECRJ ECRJ WHERE ECRJ.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECRJ.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECRJ.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECRJ.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) AS VENDOR_REJECT_RMK ,(SELECT A.REJECT_RMK FROM STOCECRJ A WHERE A.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND A.REJECT_SQ = (SELECT MAX(B.REJECT_SQ) FROM STOCECRJ B WHERE B.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND B.CONT_NUM = A.CONT_NUM AND B.CONT_CNT = A.CONT_CNT)) AS CONT_REJECT_RMK -- 협력사 전자서명 반려사유 ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IRS_NO ,(SELECT FORM_NUM FROM STOCECRL ECRL WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS FORM_NUM ,(SELECT ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = 0) AS FORM_FILE_NM ,(SELECT LISTAGG('' || ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY (ECCR.REL_FORM_SQ, ECRL.FORM_SQ), ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCR ECCR ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECCR.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECCR.FORM_NUM AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCR.REL_FORM_NUM AND ECCR.DEL_FLAG = '0') -- 2021.01.15 : 계약서폼 중복으로 인한 삭제 WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ > 0) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM -- 2021.06.30 : 선정품의 완료 후 SMS 수수료 부과 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , ECCT.GATE_CD '@@' ECCT.BUYER_CD '@@' ECCT.CONT_NUM '@@' ECCT.CONT_CNT '@@' ECCT.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd}

SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD , ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD , ECPC.VENDOR_CD , ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD , ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD , ECPC.PAY_CNT ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 고객사 ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 지불고객사 , ECPC.PAY_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECCT.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM , ECPC.GUAR_NUM AS REAL_GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , DI_ECPC.GUAR_TYPE AS DI_GUAR_TYPE , DI_ECPC.GUAR_AMT AS DI_GUAR_AMT , DI_ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS DI_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = DI_ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = DI_ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS DI_ATT_FILE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , ECPC.RMK , ECPC.INSU_STATUS , ECPC.GUAR_CANCEL_RMK , ECPC.GUAR_REJECT_RMK FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPC DI_ECPC ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = DI_ECPC.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = DI_ECPC.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = DI_ECPC.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = DI_ECPC.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = DI_ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = DI_ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = DI_ECPC.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD = DI_ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD = DI_ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND DI_ECPC.PAY_CNT = '-1' AND DI_ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD , ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD , ECPC.VENDOR_CD , ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD , ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD , ECPC.PAY_CNT ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 고객사 ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECPC.GATE_CD, ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 지불고객사 , ECPY.PAY_CNT_NM , ECPC.PAY_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE , ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT , ECPC.GUAR_QT , ECPC.GUAR_AMT , ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 , ECPC.GUARANTEER , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM ECCT.CONT_CNT WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM END GUAR_REQ_NUM_CNT , ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM , ECPC.GUAR_NUM AS REAL_GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '20' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 14), '') WHEN ECPC.GUAR_REQ_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.GUARANTEER = '10' THEN (SUBSTR(ECPC.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') END GUAR_NUM , CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ECPC_GUAR_ATT_FILE , ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECPC.RMK , ECPC.INSU_STATUS , ECPC.GUAR_CANCEL_RMK , ECPC.GUAR_REJECT_RMK FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PAY_CNT > '0' AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECPY ECPY ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = ECPY.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = ECPY.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = ECPY.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = ECPY.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPY.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPY.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = ECPY.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC.PAY_CNT = ECPY.PAY_CNT AND ECPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , ITEM_SQ ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, PR_BUYER_CD, PR_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM -- 고객사 , PURCHASE_TYPE , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , ITEM_QT , UNIT_CD , ITEM_PRC , ITEM_AMT ,(DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS DUE_DATE ,GETCUSTNAME(GATE_CD, IV_BUYER_CD) AS IV_BUYER_NM ,GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, IV_USER_ID, 'KO') AS IV_USER_NM FROM STOCECMT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT '004'||'001'||'XXXXXXXXXX'||' 00' head_docu_numb /* [필수] 문서번호 */ , #{HEAD_MESG_SEND}||'.'||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS')||'.12345.004'||'001'||'XXXXXXXXXX'||' 00' head_mang_numb /* [필수] 문서관리번호 */ ,'004'||'001'||'XXXXXXXXXX'||' 00' head_refr_numb /* [필수] 참조번호 */
,NVL(( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(BID_END_DATE,1), 'YYYYMMDD') FROM STOCBDPG K WHERE K.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND K.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND K.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND K.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND K.VOTE_CNT = ( SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG M WHERE M.GATE_CD = K.GATE_CD AND M.BUYER_CD = K.BUYER_CD AND M.BID_NUM = K.BID_NUM AND M.BID_CNT = K.BID_CNT ) ), TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(B.APP_END_DATE,1), 'YYYYMMDD')) bond_fnsh_date /* [필수] " 보험종료일자 - YYYYMMDD" */ ,NVL(#{BID_GUAR_AMT}, A.BID_GUAR_AMT) bond_penl_amnt /* " 보험가입금액 예) 1500000 */
,'XXXXXXXXXX' bidd_noti_numb /* [필수] 공고번호 - 피보험자 측 입찰번호 (차수를 포함한 정확한 입찰번호만 기재) ex) T2008100100 */ ,'000' bidd_proc_type /*필수 계약구분코드 - 별첨 sheet의 코드 참조 (농협정보시스템은 계약구분코드를 세분화 할수 없기때문에 '000' 자릿수만 채워서 보낸 후 서울보증에서 농협으로 증권번호 수신 시 계약명등 내용에 맞는 계약구분코드 선택하여 수신 ) */ ,B.ANN_ITEM bidd_name_text /*필수 입찰건명 */ ,5 AS bidd_pric_rate /* 보증금율 */ ,( SELECT OPEN_DATE FROM STOCBDPG K WHERE K.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND K.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND K.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND K.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND K.VOTE_CNT = ( SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG M WHERE M.GATE_CD = K.GATE_CD AND M.BUYER_CD = K.BUYER_CD AND M.BID_NUM = K.BID_NUM AND M.BID_CNT = K.BID_CNT )) bidd_frop_date /*필수 1차 입찰일 - YYYYMMDD */ -- ,B.APP_BEGIN_DATE bidd_frop_date /*필수 1차 입찰일 - YYYYMMDD */ ,null bidd_sdop_date /* 2차 입찰일 - YYYYMMDD */ ,NVL(( SELECT BID_END_DATE || BID_BEGIN_TIME FROM STOCBDPG K WHERE K.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND K.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND K.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND K.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND K.VOTE_CNT = ( SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG M WHERE M.GATE_CD = K.GATE_CD AND M.BUYER_CD = K.BUYER_CD AND M.BID_NUM = K.BID_NUM AND M.BID_CNT = K.BID_CNT ) ), B.APP_END_DATE||B.APP_END_TIME ) bidd_fnsh_date /* 입찰마감일자 */ ,B.APP_PLACE bidd_open_spot /* 입찰장소 */ ,null hist_bond_numb /* 변경(배서) 대상 증권번호 - 기존에 발행되었던 신규(원) 증권번호(18자리) 예)100000200801111111- 꼭 18자리 원증권번호이어야 함- 기존 증권구분번호가 004001100000200800123456 00 이었다면 밑줄 되어 있는 부분이 원증권번호 18자리 임 */
,'1' cred_exst_code /*필수 채권자 존재형태 구분 - 1:단독, 2:공동 */ ,C.CUST_NM cred_orga_name /*필수 기관명 - 피보험자 상호 */ ,'O' cred_orps_divs /*필수 개인/사업자 구분 코드 - O - 사업자, P - 개인 */ ,C.IRS_NUM cred_orps_iden /*필수 "사업자/주민등록번호 - O인 경우 사업자번호, P인 경우 주민등록번호" */ ,'1111111111111' cred_ownr_numb /* 대표자 주민등록번호 */ ,C.CEO_USER_NM cred_ownr_name /* 대표자 성명 */ ,C.CUST_NM cred_bond_hold /*필수 채권자 명(상호) */ ,null cred_addn_name /* 채권기관 부가상호 */ ,C.ZIP_CD cred_orga_post /*필수 회사 우편번호 */ ,C.ADDR1||(C.ADDR2,' ') cred_orga_addr /* [필수] 회사 주소 */ ,D.USER_NM cred_chrg_name /*필수 담당자 이름 */ ,D.DEPT_NM cred_dept_name /*필수 담당자 소속 부서 */ ,D.TEL_NUM cred_phon_numb /*필수 담당자 전화 번호 */ ,D.CELL_NUM cred_cell_phon /*필수 담당자 휴대전화 번호 */ ,D.EMAIL cred_send_mail /*필수 담당자 e-Mail 주소 */ ,'A120870175500' cred_user_iden /*필수 수신처 아이디 - 헤더정보의 전문송신기관 아이디 */ ,'NHI' cred_user_type /*필수 수신처TYPE - 헤더정보의 연계기관코드 */ ,'1' appl_exst_code /*필수 계약자 존재 형태 구분 - 1:단독, 2:공동 */ ,E.VENDOR_NM appl_orga_name /* 기관명 */ ,'O' appl_orps_divs /* 구분코드 - O:사업자 P:개인 */ ,null appl_orga_numb /* 법인등록번호 */ ,E.IRS_NO appl_orps_iden /* "사업자/주민등록번호 - O인 경우 사업자번호, P인 경우 주민등록번호" */ ,'1111111111111' appl_ownr_numb /* "대표자 주민등록번호 - 개인사업자일 경우 필수 입력" */ ,E.CEO_USER_NM appl_ownr_name /* 대표자 이름 */ ,null appl_addn_name /* 계약업체 부가 상호 */ ,E.HQ_ZIP_CD appl_orga_post /* 계약 회사 우편번호 */ ,E.HQ_ADDR_1||(E.HQ_ADDR_2,' ') appl_orga_addr /* 계약 회사 주소 */ ,F.USER_NM appl_chrg_name /* 담당자 이름 */ ,'입찰부서' appl_dept_name /* 담당자 소속 부서 */ ,F.CELL_NUM appl_offc_phon /* 담당자 전화 번호 */ ,F.CELL_NUM appl_cell_phon /* 담당자 휴대전화 번호 */ ,F.EMAIL appl_send_mail /* 담당자 e-Mail 주소 */ ,null appl_home_post /* 자택 우편번호 */ ,null appl_home_addr /* 자택 주소 */ ,null appl_home_phon /* 자택 전화 번호 */ ,'A120870175500' appl_user_iden /*필수 수신처 아이디 - 헤더정보의 전문송신기관 */ ,'NHI' appl_user_type /*필수 수신처 Type - 헤더정보의 연계기관코드 */ ,A.GUAR_REQ_NUM ,A.INSU_STATUS ,A.GUAR_NUM FROM STOCBDHD B LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP A ON B.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND B.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND B.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND B.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND A.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} LEFT JOIN STOCCUST C ON C.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND C.CUST_CD = B.BUYER_CD LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR D ON D.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD -- 구매사담당자 AND D.USER_ID = B.BID_USER_ID LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL E ON E.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND E.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR F ON F.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} -- 업체사담당자 AND F.USER_ID = #{ses.userId} WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND B.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT UUID , UUID_SQ , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXTENSION , REAL_FILE_NM , BIZ_TYPE , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , FILE_SQ , DEL_FLAG , ENC_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , PR_BUYER_CD , UP_DATE , COMPANY_DEPT , PR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = #{PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM}
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCECPC SET GUAR_REQ_NUM = NULL , GUAR_NUM = NULL , GUAR_RESULT = NULL , INSU_STATUS = NULL -- , GUAR_TYPE2 = NULL , GUARANTEER = NULL , BOND_BEGN_DATE = NULL , BOND_FNSH_DATE = NULL WHERE GUAR_REQ_NUM = #{GUAR_REQ_NUM} AND GUAR_TYPE = #{GUAR_TYPE}

UPDATE STOCECPC SET GUAR_REQ_NUM = NULL , GUAR_NUM = NULL , GUAR_RESULT = NULL , INSU_STATUS = NULL , GUAR_TYPE2 = NULL , GUARANTEER = NULL , BOND_BEGN_DATE = NULL , BOND_FNSH_DATE = NULL , GUAR_CANCEL_STATUS = 'E' , GUAR_CANCEL_CONFIRM_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE GUAR_REQ_NUM = #{GUAR_REQ_NUM} AND GUAR_TYPE = #{GUAR_TYPE}
